nasb.text: “In that day a fountain will be opened for the house of David and for the inhabitants of Jerusalem, for sin and for impurity.

esv.text: “On that day there shall be a fountain opened for the house of David and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, to cleanse them from sin and uncleanness.

cnv.text: “到那日，必有一個泉源，為大衛家和耶路撒冷的居民開放，洗除他們的罪惡和不潔。

ccb.text: “到那天，必为大卫家和耶路撒冷的居民开一个泉源，洗净他们的罪恶和污秽。
